function.message: No recorded message from Oberleitner Hanna was found in any channel transcript.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), read nested AGENTS.MD before entering folders, and used channel logs (not cast record) for message history. Exhaustively checked every file in 60_outbox/channels as required.
function.outcome_justification: In all reviewed channel transcripts, no message block has author/author_id matching Hanna Oberleitner (`Hanna`, `entity.hanna`). `studio_signal.md` includes `entity.hanna` only in participants, with recorded messages authored by Petra and Miles.
